title: Syria reports new Israeli incursion into Quneitra village amid ongoing border tensions

snapshot.title: Syria reports new Israeli incursion into Quneitra village amid ongoing border tensions
snapshot.description: QUNEITRA, Syria: Israeli forces carried out an overnight incursion into a village in Syria’s southern Quneitra province, raiding several homes before withdrawing, Syrian state media reported on Thursday, in the latest incident highlighting ongoing tensions along the frontier. According to the Syrian Arab News Agency (SANA), a unit consisting of nine Israeli military vehicles
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Syria reports new Israeli incursion into Quneitra village amid ongoing border tensions | Arab News
